opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Tom mentioned tidy finishes on a job with NFS Plumbing & Heating. That stood out.
source_quote: Nick has done an excellent job on various projects in my house including installing a new flue, removing a gas fire and installing a downstairs toilet. Throughout all these tasks he's shown himself to be a thoughtful and capable engineer and adept at solving problems and coming up with creative solu
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Tom)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Tom mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
